questions.stem: The movie was so ___ that I fell asleep halfway through.
questions.explanation: boring (无聊的) 与 'fell asleep (睡着了)' 语境匹配。

questions.stem: She decided to ___ his invitation to the party.
questions.explanation: accept (接受) 是搭配 'invitation' 最自然的动词。若后面有 'because she was busy' 则 refuse 也可。题干中立语境下 accept 为最优。

questions.stem: Regular exercise can ___ your physical and mental health.
questions.explanation: improve (改善) 与健康话题搭配，regular exercise 的好处是常识。

questions.stem: The company plans to ___ 50 new employees next month.
questions.explanation: hire (雇佣) 对应 'new employees (新员工)'。

questions.stem: The professor asked us to ___ our essays by Friday.
questions.explanation: submit (提交) 是学术场景最常用搭配：submit homework/essay/assignment。

questions.stem: It's important to ___ a balance between work and leisure.
questions.explanation: maintain a balance (保持平衡) 是固定搭配。

questions.stem: The medicine should ___ the pain within 30 minutes.
questions.explanation: relieve the pain (缓解疼痛) 是医药场景常用搭配。

questions.stem: His ___ for learning new languages impressed everyone.
questions.explanation: enthusiasm (热情) 与 'impressed everyone (让所有人印象深刻)' 语境一致。

questions.stem: We need to ___ this problem before it gets worse.
questions.explanation: address a problem (处理问题) 是正式语境下常用的表达。

questions.stem: The company's profits have increased ___ over the past year.
questions.explanation: significantly (显著地) 适合强调利润增长的程度。slightly 和 barely 意思相近但偏弱。

questions.stem: The scientist's discovery had a ___ impact on modern medicine.
questions.explanation: profound (深远的) 修饰 impact，表示重大影响。trivial/superficial(表面的) 语义相反。

questions.stem: The two countries reached a ___ agreement after months of negotiation.
questions.explanation: mutual agreement (双方协议) 是外交/商业常用搭配。unilateral(单方面的) 与 'two countries' 矛盾。

questions.stem: She was ___ to admit that she had made a mistake.
questions.explanation: reluctant (不情愿的) 修饰 admit a mistake 是自然搭配：不情愿承认错误。

questions.stem: The evidence was ___ enough to convince even the most skeptical jury members.
questions.explanation: compelling evidence (令人信服的证据) 是法律/论证场景高频搭配。ambiguous(模糊的) 和 contradictory(矛盾的) 语义相反。

questions.stem: The author's latest novel has been widely ___ for its innovative narrative structure.
questions.explanation: acclaimed (赞誉) 与 'innovative narrative structure' 正面评价一致。widely acclaimed 是常见搭配。

questions.stem: The politician tried to ___ the scandal, but the media continued to investigate.
questions.explanation: suppress (压制/隐瞒) 与 'but the media continued...' 构成转折：试图压住丑闻但媒体穷追不舍。

questions.stem: His argument was ___; none of the evidence he cited was relevant to the topic.
questions.explanation: spurious (站不住脚的/似是而非的) 与 'none...relevant' 对应。coherent/persuasive 语义相反。

questions.stem: Reading extensively can ___ your vocabulary and improve your writing skills.
questions.explanation: expand your vocabulary (扩大词汇量) 是学习场景最常见搭配。

questions.stem: If I ___ you, I would study harder for the exam.
questions.explanation: 虚拟语气中与现在事实相反的假设，be 动词一律用 were（所有人称）。

questions.stem: Neither the teacher nor the students ___ satisfied with the result.
questions.explanation: neither...nor... 的主谓一致采用就近原则，离谓语最近的是 the students（复数），故用 are。

questions.stem: She has been studying English ___ three years.
questions.explanation: for + 时间段（three years）；since + 时间点。

questions.stem: By the time he arrived, the meeting ___.
questions.explanation: by the time + 过去式 → 主句用过去完成时 (had started)，表示 '在到达之前已经开始了'。

questions.stem: It was in this very room ___ the historic decision was made.
questions.explanation: 强调句型 It is/was...that...，此处强调地点状语 in this very room。

questions.stem: Not until the teacher came in ___ talking.
questions.explanation: Not until 置于句首，主句需部分倒装（助动词提前 + 主语 + 动词原形）。

questions.stem: The number of students who ___ interested in this course ___ increasing.
questions.explanation: who 指代 students（复数）用 are；The number of... 作主语，核心词 number 是单数，用 is。

questions.stem: ___ for your timely help, we would not have completed the project on time.
questions.explanation: 与过去事实相反的虚拟条件句省略 if 时倒装：Had it not been for... = If it had not been for...。

questions.stem: I wish I ___ to the concert last night. I heard it was amazing.
questions.explanation: wish 后的从句表示与过去事实相反的愿望，用过去完成时 had gone。

questions.stem: So confused ___ that he couldn't answer a single question on the exam.
questions.explanation: So + 形容词 置于句首，主句需部分倒装：So confused was he = He was so confused。

questions.stem: She is one of those people who ___ always willing to help others.
questions.explanation: one of + 复数名词 + who 结构中，who 指代的是复数名词 people，故用 are。

questions.stem: He insisted that the plan ___ carried out immediately.
questions.explanation: insist (坚持要求) + that 从句用虚拟语气 (should) + 动词原形，should 可省略。
